package.name: imaging_station_ndi_bridge
package.description: Native NDI receiver executable for the imaging_station provider. Vendored from experiment_collector's ndi_sdk_av_bridge: dlopens libndi.so.6 at runtime, listens on a Unix socket, and streams NDI video/audio frames as "AVB1" binary packets so a Python rclpy node can republish them as sensor_msgs/Image. The Python side lives in the imaging_station package; this package only ships the binary.
